full_text:
Zhang Su (Junjiao) 張肅 (君矯)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Su (張肅), styledJunjiao (君矯). Governor of Guanghan, discovered the treachery of his brother Zhang Song and warned Liu Zhang. Zhang Su was affiliated with Liu Zhang.
